description_long: This is a corner-style wooden shelving unit with a pentagonal top surface, designed to fit snugly into a corner space. The front features two open columns, each with two horizontal shelves, providing four open compartments for storage or display. The wood has a medium brown finish with visible knots and grain patterns, giving it a rustic and natural appearance. The sides are solid panels, while the back is a single flat panel, ensuring stability and a clean look from behind. The base has small cutouts for decorative effect, and the overall construction appears sturdy and functional for holding books, electronics, or decorative items. There are no doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open-access design.
description: A rustic, brown wooden corner shelving unit with four open compartments and a pentagonal top, designed for corner placement. The open design and visible wood grain give it a sturdy, natural look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two columns of open shelves, each with two compartments, and the pentagonal top surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid side panel and the angled shape of the top, with open access to the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back panel and the solid construction, with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the solid panel and open shelf access.
